google.description: Focus on graphs, trees, strings, and DP with medium-hard progression.

amazon.description: Arrays, heaps, sliding window, and design-style implementation patterns.

meta.description: Graph traversal, trees, and practical string/hashmap optimization.

microsoft.description: DP, recursion/backtracking, and clean implementation under constraints.

netflix.description: High-signal optimization focused on graphs, greedy, and systems-minded problems.
